query: SELECT id, name, category, price, isAvailable, squareCatalogId, squareVariationId, imageUrl FROM menuItems WHERE category = 'Bubble Tea' OR name LIKE '%Bubble%' OR name LIKE '%Tea%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
